network.description: Name of VPC network connected with service producers using VPC peering.

service.description: Provider peering service that is managing peering connectivity for a service provider organization. For Google services that support this functionality it is 'servicenetworking.googleapis.com'

reserved_peering_ranges.description: Named IP address range(s) of PEERING type reserved for this service provider. Note that invoking this method with a different range when connection is already established will not reallocate already provisioned service producer subnetworks.
